title: UP’s ₹25,000 crore Puch AI MoU faces scrutiny over startup credentials
description: Uttar Pradesh chief minister Yogi Adityanath’s announcement of ₹25,000 crore MoU with artificial intelligence (AI) startup has drawn sharp online criticism over the company’s credentials| India News
